title: Enphase Energy Q2 2024 Earnings: Key Takeaways
text: Enphase Energy reported Q2 2024 revenue of $303.5 million with a gross margin of 47.1% non-GAAP, up from 46.2% in Q1. The company generated free cash flow of $117.4 million with a non-GAAP diluted EPS of $0.43. The company shipped approximately 1.4 million microinverters and 120 MWh of batteries. For Q3 2024 guidance, the company expects revenue range of $370-$410 million and battery shipments of 160-180 MWh with gross margin of 47-50% non-GAAP with IRA benefit. More than 85% of orders were booked to the midpoint. U.S. revenue increased 32% versus Q1, while European sell-through grew 3% quarter-over-quarter. Regarding California NEM 3.0, 60% of installations were NEM 3.0 as of the last week with battery attach rates exceeding 90%. The company plans to launch the IQ9 microinverter in 2H 2025 and a fourth-generation battery in early 2025, with U.S. battery manufacturing beginning Q4 2024.
